zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Hexstall I於1350年出生在英國英格蘭爾阿克頓時，他的父親Thomas Hexstall30歲，母親Mrs. Thomas Hexstall25歲。他於大約1381年與Elizabeth Hewitt在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1382年在英國英格蘭爾享年32歲。

German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hexstall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Hexstall I was born in 1350, in Acton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Hexstall, was 30 and his mother, Mrs. Thomas Hexstall, was 25. He married Elizabeth Hewitt about 1381, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1382, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 32.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Hexstall I est né en 1350, à Acton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Hexstall, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Thomas Hexstall, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Hewitt environ 1381, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1382, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 32 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Hexstall I(이)가 1350년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 악턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Hexstall(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Thomas Hexstall(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1381년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Elizabeth Hewitt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1382년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Hexstall I родился в 1350 г. в местности актон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Hexstall было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Thomas Hexstall, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Hewitt около 1381 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1382 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 32 лет.
